Interface AotContext.AotContextBuilder

Enclosing interface:
AotContext
public static interface AotContext.AotContextBuilder
Builder to create AotContext instances.
Since:
4.0.5
Author:
Christoph Strobl, John Blum, Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AotContext.AotContextBuilder
    beanFactory(BeanFactory beanFactory)
    Configure the BeanFactory to use.
    AotContext
    build()
    Build the AotContext to use.
    AotContext.AotContextBuilder
    customizeTypeCollector(Consumer<TypeCollector> typeCollectorConsumer)
    Provide a consumer to customize TypeCollector.
    AotContext.AotContextBuilder
    environment(Environment environment)
    Configure the Environment to use.

  • Method Details

    • beanFactory

      AotContext.AotContextBuilder beanFactory(BeanFactory beanFactory)
      Configure the BeanFactory to use. Must be provided.
      Parameters:
      beanFactory - the bean factory to use.
      Returns:
      this builder.

    • environment

      AotContext.AotContextBuilder environment(Environment environment)
      Configure the Environment to use. Defaults to StandardEnvironment if not configured.
      Parameters:
      environment - the environment to use.
      Returns:
      this builder.

    • customizeTypeCollector

      AotContext.AotContextBuilder customizeTypeCollector(Consumer<TypeCollector> typeCollectorConsumer)
      Provide a consumer to customize TypeCollector.
      Parameters:
      typeCollectorConsumer - the consumer to configure TypeCollector.
      Returns:
      this builder.

    • build

      AotContext build()
      Build the AotContext to use. Building the AotContext requires beanFactory(BeanFactory) to be configured.
      Returns:
      the build AotContext to use.
